Chapter: Business Meeting Report Process.
Current document status: Draft.

Section: Business Meeting Report Process.

Section: Purpose.

Define how financial reports are prepared and communicated for church business meetings.

Section: Steps.

Prepare report packet.
Treasurer and finance committee review.
Resolve questions or exceptions.
Present summary at business meeting.
Record motions, approvals, and follow-up items.

End of chapter: Business Meeting Report Process.
